case_title: GREENWORX VS. ENVIRONMENTAL REMEDIES INC.et al.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-05-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENVIRONMENTAL REMEDIES INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT THOMAS A. BROCATO. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,600.00 FILED BY GREENWORX AS TO DEFENDANT ENVIRONMENTAL REMEDIES INC. BROCATO, THOMAS A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
